name: Calvin Harris Live in Bengaluru
about: The GRAMMY Award-winning producer, DJ and songwriter Calvin Harris makes his long-awaited India debut! Known for era-defining hits like 'We Found Love', 'One Kiss', 'Summer', 'Feel So Close', and his latest single 'Blessings', Calvin Harris brings his unparalleled sound and spectacular visual production to India for the very first time. This is part of his three-city India Tour produced by Sunburn and BookMyShow Live. Expect a career-spanning setlist of massive anthems, soaring visuals and an unforgettable night of electronic music. With over 35 billion combined streams, this is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to witness the King of Dance Music live.

name: Core Open Air ft Tori Levett
about: Bangalore, we missed this energy. The wait is over — Core Open Air popup is back. 7th March — we take over High Ultra Lounge with Tori Levett and pure open-air festival vibes. Sunset skies, deep sounds, and that Core crowd again under one roof — or rather, no roof at all. CORE: The philosophy behind Core is to touch the hearts of those who attend by soulful Music, Art and Culture from different Artists and Artisans from across the world.

address.streetAddress: 26/1, Rooftop, World Trade Center, Dr Rajkumar Rd, Malleshwaram

name: Holi Crcle 2026
about: An elevated Holi celebration where color meets couture and tradition blends with modern luxury. Featuring curated music, premium beverages, and refined entertainment at JW Marriott Bengaluru. Gates open at 11:30 AM. Tickets from ₹999.

address.streetAddress: 24/1, Vittal Mallya Rd, KG Halli, Shanthala Nagar, Ashok Nagar
